label: Royal title permit
description: Defines a permit in a faction's royal title system. Permits grant callable abilities (drop resources, call aid, orbital strike, etc.) that pawns earn by spending permit points when receiving a royal title.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements the permit's callable ability. Defaults to RoyalTitlePermitWorker when omitted (trade-only permits with no active ability).

royalAid.label: Royal aid
royalAid.description: Configuration for the permit's callable aid action. Omit for passive or trade-only permits.

cooldownDays.label: Cooldown days
cooldownDays.description: Number of in-game days before the permit can be used again for free. Omit for permits with no cooldown.

minTitle.label: Min title
minTitle.description: Minimum royal title required for the player to hold this permit.

permitPointCost.label: Permit point cost
permitPointCost.description: Number of permit points spent when a pawn selects this permit upon receiving a royal title. Defaults to 0.

faction.label: Faction
faction.description: FactionDef whose members can grant or be affected by this permit.

usableOnWorldMap.label: Usable on world map
usableOnWorldMap.description: If true, this permit can be called while the player is on the world map. Defaults to false.

prerequisite.label: Prerequisite
prerequisite.description: Another RoyalTitlePermitDef that must already be held before this permit can be selected.

uiPosition.label: UI position
uiPosition.description: Position of this permit in the permit selection grid UI, as (column, row). Example: (0,6).

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: PlanetLayerDefs on which this permit cannot be called.

basic.label: Basic permit
basic.description: A minimal permit definition with a defName and label.
